title: Stave Control Contract v1
description: Contract schema for ctrl.v1 controls (safety rules). Each control defines an unsafe condition that Stave evaluates against observation snapshots.

controlType.title: Control Check Type
controlType.description: Category of safety check this control performs.

predicateRule.title: Predicate Rule
predicateRule.description: A single predicate rule that tests an asset field, or a nested logical group of rules.

field.title: Field Path
field.description: Dot-separated field path to evaluate on the asset (e.g., properties.public, properties.acl.grants).

op.title: Comparison Operator
op.description: Comparison operator to apply between the field value and the target value.

value.title: Comparison Value
value.description: Literal value to compare against. Type depends on the operator (boolean, string, number, array, etc.).

value_from_param.title: Parameter Reference
value_from_param.description: Name of a parameter in the control's params object whose value is used instead of a literal value.

any.title: Any Match Rules
any.description: Nested OR logic: at least one child rule must match for this group to match.

all.title: All Match Rules
all.description: Nested AND logic: all child rules must match for this group to match.

predicate.title: Unsafe Predicate
predicate.description: Top-level predicate defining unsafe conditions using logical combinators (any/all).

any.title: Any Match Rules
any.description: OR logic: at least one rule must match for the predicate to hold.

all.title: All Match Rules
all.description: AND logic: all rules must match for the predicate to hold.

canonicalControl.title: Canonical Control
canonicalControl.description: A complete control definition including metadata, predicate logic, and optional remediation guidance.

id.title: Control ID
id.description: Unique control identifier following the naming convention (e.g., CTL.S3.PUBLIC.001).

name.title: Control Name
name.description: Short human-readable name summarizing what the control checks.

description.title: Control Description
description.description: Detailed explanation of the unsafe condition this control detects.

version.title: Control Version
version.description: Optional control document version marker used by curated packs.

domain.title: Control Domain
domain.description: Optional domain label for grouping controls (e.g., exposure, governance, access).

scope_tags.title: Scope Tags
scope_tags.description: Optional tags describing applicability scope (e.g., aws, s3, prod).

type.title: Check Type
type.description: Category of safety check (e.g., unsafe_state, authorization_boundary).

severity.title: Severity Level
severity.description: Severity level assigned to violations of this control.

compliance.title: Compliance Framework Mappings
compliance.description: Maps compliance framework names to control IDs (e.g., cis_aws_v1.4.0: "2.1.1").

params.title: Configurable Parameters
params.description: Configurable parameters referenced by value_from_param in predicate rules. Intentionally flexible (any JSON object) to support diverse parameterization patterns.

unsafe_predicate.title: Unsafe Predicate
unsafe_predicate.description: Predicate that defines when an asset is considered unsafe. When this predicate matches, a finding is generated.

unsafe_predicate_alias.title: Unsafe Predicate Alias
unsafe_predicate_alias.description: Built-in semantic predicate alias expanded deterministically during control loading (for example: s3.is_public_readable).

exposure.title: Exposure Classification
exposure.description: Classifies who can reach the asset and how.

type.title: Exposure Type
type.description: Kind of exposure (e.g., public_read, acl_write, bucket_takeover).

principal_scope.title: Principal Scope
principal_scope.description: Audience that gains access (e.g., global, authenticated, cross_account).

remediation.title: Remediation Guidance
remediation.description: Guidance for remediating violations of this control.

description.title: Remediation Description
description.description: Human-readable explanation of how to fix the unsafe condition.

action.title: Remediation Action
action.description: Concrete remediation action (e.g., a CLI command, API call, or configuration change).

example.title: Remediation Example
example.description: Optional example showing the remediation action applied to a real asset.
